title: Creating Salts Wood to benefit the local community
body: "Woodland creation case study: Salts Wood.  Andy Humphryes, vice chair of the Boughton Monchelsea Parish Council, shares with us the newly planted Salts Wood. Salts Wood is a 33-acre woodland creation project, made up of 22,000 native trees.  With accessible hard paths that circle the woods, Salts Wood is a place for the whole community to enjoy, along with local wildlife. "
